meaning: 1. to open; 2. to start (a business etc); 3. to set up
sentence: 她打算开办一家小型烘焙店。
pinyin: Tā dǎsuàn kāibàn yī jiā xiǎoxíng hōngbèi diàn.
english: She plans to open a small bakery.

meaning: 1. service desk; 2. information desk; 3. reception desk
sentence: 请到一楼服务台办理登记手续。
pinyin: Qǐng dào yī lóu fúwùtái bànlǐ dēngjì shǒuxù.
english: Please go to the service desk on the first floor to check in.

sentence: 她把面团揉成长条再切块。
pinyin: Tā bǎ miàntuán róu chéng cháng tiáo zài qiē kuài.
english: She kneaded the dough into a long strip and then cut it into pieces.

sentence: 海洋中的鱼类种类非常丰富。
pinyin: Hǎiyáng zhōng de yúlèi zhǒnglèi fēicháng fēngfù.
english: There are very many species of fish in the ocean.

sentence: 他大学学的是信息管理专业。
pinyin: Tā dà xué xué de shì xìn xī guǎn lǐ zhuān yè.
english: He majored in information management in college.
